items.name: Mageblood
items.flavour_text: The river does not ask where the ocean begins.
use_cases: Enables permanent Flask uptime — a massive QoL and power boost for any build.
Best-in-slot for endgame mapping and bossing where Flask sustain matters.
Frees up passive tree points that would otherwise go toward Flask duration.

items.name: Headhunter

explicit_mods.text: When you Kill a Rare Monster, you gain its Mods for 20 seconds

items.flavour_text: A man's head is his most valuable possession. Figuratively and literally.
use_cases: The ultimate mapping belt — stealing Rare monster mods creates absurd power spikes.
Transforms any build into a screen-clearing machine during juiced maps.
Best paired with fast-clearing builds that encounter many Rare monsters.

items.name: Kaom's Heart
items.flavour_text: The warrior who fears nothing is master of all.
use_cases: Massive Life pool for builds that don't need body armour sockets.
Popular for RF (Righteous Fire) builds and other Fire damage builds.
Pairs with Unset Rings or other socket sources to compensate for zero sockets.

items.name: Aegis Aurora

explicit_mods.text: Replenishes Energy Shield by 2% of Armour when you Block

items.flavour_text: Born of Winter, forged in the heart of the mountain.
use_cases: Core item for Armour-stacking tank builds that also invest in Block.
Converts Armour investment into ES recovery, creating near-immortal characters.
Best-in-slot shield for any build pairing Determination + high Block chance.

items.name: Ashes of the Stars

explicit_mods.text: +(10-20)% to Quality of all Skill Gems
+1 to Level of all Skill Gems

items.flavour_text: Some burn to illuminate. Others burn to empower.
use_cases: Universal gem-boosting amulet — +1 Level and Quality enhance every linked skill.
Particularly strong for builds that heavily benefit from gem quality (e.g., AoE, Duration).
Reservation Efficiency frees up mana/spirit for an extra Aura.

items.name: Heatshiver

explicit_mods.text: Gain 100% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage against Frozen Enemies

items.flavour_text: Between ice and flame, all that remains is power.
use_cases: Best-in-slot for Cold builds that can reliably Freeze enemies — effectively doubles damage.
Popular with Ice Spear, Freezing Pulse, and other high-Freeze skills.
Budget-friendly option that rivals expensive Rare helmets in terms of DPS.

items.name: Nimis

explicit_mods.text: Projectiles are fired in random directions

items.flavour_text: What goes out must come back in.
use_cases: Doubles the effective hit count for Projectile builds — returning projectiles hit twice.
Best paired with shotgunning skills like Spark or Lightning Strike.
The 'random directions' downside is offset by projectile count and area coverage.

items.name: Dawnbreaker

explicit_mods.text: (10-15)% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage

items.flavour_text: The dawn that breaks the darkness is not gentle.
use_cases: Physical-to-Fire conversion enables powerful mitigation stacking with Fire Resistance.
Core for RF (Righteous Fire) tank setups that need both damage and defence.
Pairs well with Purity of Fire and other Fire-related Aura builds.

items.name: Forbidden Flame

explicit_mods.text: Allocates <Ascendancy Notable> if you have the matching modifier on Forbidden Flesh

items.flavour_text: Duality is the foundation of all power.
use_cases: Unlocks an extra Ascendancy Notable when paired with matching Forbidden Flesh.
Enables build-defining combos from other Ascendancy classes.
Extremely valuable when it rolls a strong Notable like Forbidden Rite or Headsman.

items.name: Seven-League Step
items.flavour_text: Each step covers leagues, yet the journey never ends.
use_cases: Pure speed boots — 50% MS is the highest single source in the game.
Ideal for levelling new characters or speed-farming low-tier content.
No other stats means you sacrifice defences, so it's a clear speed-vs-safety trade-off.

items.name: Original Sin

explicit_mods.text: All Damage with Hits can Poison
Enemies you hit have -10% to all Resistances
Your Hits cannot deal Chaos Damage

items.flavour_text: Sin is merely another word for freedom.
use_cases: Universal Resistance shred — -10% to ALL enemy Resistances is a massive DPS boost.
Works in any build; the 'no Chaos Damage' downside rarely matters for non-Chaos builds.
'All Damage can Poison' opens interesting hybrid Poison scaling opportunities.

items.name: Oriath's Vigil

explicit_mods.text: Nearby Allies have +2% Chance to Block
(10-15)% increased Area of Effect for Auras from your Skills

items.flavour_text: Stand behind me. I shall be your wall.
use_cases: Support/Aura bot shield — extends Aura range and provides Block to nearby allies.
Solid for party play where Aura coverage and team defence matter.
Decent Life and Armour make it usable even as a solo tank shield.
